question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main parts of the thesis: a theoretical part and a practical part, and further breaks down the theoretical part into three sub‑sections. This satisfies the requirement to list the main sections.

question: Description
feedback: The description covers only the theoretical part, detailing its three sub‑sections. The practical part is mentioned but not described. Therefore the text does not fully meet the requirement to briefly describe contents of each section.

question: Structure
feedback: While the text provides a partial outline of the thesis structure, the absence of any description of the practical part makes the overall structure unclear. A more complete overview would improve comprehension.
